_comment: Phase E1 scheduler jobs. Times are in SCHEDULER_TZ (default Asia/Kolkata). cron supports hour, minute, and optional day_of_week (mon-sun or 0-6). Set enabled=false to pause a brand without removing it.

jobs.note: PAUSED Jun 19 2026 per Gaurav — no automation until green signal. Trend Researcher + Data Analyst -> Trend Sentinel, every morning 06:30 IST
PAUSED Jun 19 2026 per Gaurav — no automation until green signal. Staggered 30m after askgauravai to avoid overlap
